seo.summary: The page has a clear meta title and description, and a single H1, which provides a solid SEO foundation.
findings: metaTitle is present and well-formed at 51 characters — within the recommended 50–60 character range.
metaDescription is present at 88 characters — within the optimal 120–160 character range, though more specific.
h1Count is 1 — correct; only one primary heading found. h2Count is 3, providing reasonable content structure.

messaging.summary: The messaging is focused on B2B agency positioning but could be more specific about differentiators.
findings: The content excerpt opens with a clear value proposition referencing SEO and conversion — strong above-the-fold messaging.
wordCount is 487 — sufficient for a homepage but limited for establishing deep expertise signals.

cta.summary: CTA usage is adequate with 4 detected calls-to-action, appropriate for a marketing homepage.
findings: ctaCount is 4 — reasonable for a homepage. Ratio of 1 CTA per ~122 words is within best practice range.
CTA language in excerpt includes action-oriented phrases appropriate for B2B lead generation.

contentDepth.summary: Content depth is moderate; the word count supports basic SEO but may benefit from more supporting detail.
findings: wordCount is 487 — above the 300-word minimum threshold for indexable content.
h2Count is 3 with h3Count of 2 — reasonable sectioning for the word count, aiding scannability.

ux.summary: Image accessibility needs improvement; alt text coverage is below the recommended threshold.
findings: altTextPercent is 67 — approximately 2 of 6 images are missing alt text, creating accessibility and SEO gaps.
imageCount is 6 — good visual content presence. Fixing alt text on remaining images is a quick win.
internalLinks is 12 vs externalLinks is 3 — healthy internal linking ratio supports site architecture.

recommendations.title: Add alt text to all images
recommendations.reasoning: altTextPercent is 67, meaning approximately 2 of the 6 images (imageCount: 6) lack descriptive alt attributes. This harms both accessibility compliance (WCAG AA) and image search indexability.

recommendations.title: Expand meta description specificity
recommendations.reasoning: metaDescription is present but at 88 characters it is well below the 150-character optimal length. A more specific description improves click-through rates from search results.

recommendations.title: Increase content depth on key service pages
recommendations.reasoning: wordCount is 487 — while adequate for a homepage, supporting pages likely need 800–1200 words to compete in organic search for target keywords.
